context.summary: Use your BBC micro:bit to improve your game by collecting sports science data on the strength of kicks or racket strokes.
improve_it: Use data from the kick-strength meter to help you and a partner improve the consistency of your passes over a period of time.
Collect data over longer periods of time by logging less often. Change the time in the âeveryâ block to a larger number.
Add an audible or visual alert if your kick strength goes over a certain value.
